title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 9: Pauli Matrices
desc: Proofs of Pauli matrix identities and spin operators.

title: Ergosphere Angular Velocity Range
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range for observers inside Kerr ergosphere, approaching horizon.

title: Interferometer Noise and Quantum Noise
desc: Analysis of noise sources in Advanced LIGO, focusing on quantum noise and thermal effects.

title: 量子力学第8次作业：角动量对易与矢量算符
desc: 证明角动量算符与矢量算符的对易关系及叉积恒等式。

title: 统计力学第10次作业：自由电子气体
desc: 计算绝对零度下自由电子气体的平均速率、费米能量、内能和简并压。

title: Debye Model: Partition Function, Internal Energy, Entropy
desc: Derives ln Z, U, S for solids at high and low T using Debye spectrum.

title: Photon Field Energy-Momentum Tensor
desc: Derivation of gauge invariant, traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Proof of Lorentz invariance of inner product and optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source j.

title: Null Momentum Spinor Decomposition and LGTs
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with p0<0 and shows LGT transformation.

title: 4-Gluon Amplitude Vanishing and Factorization
desc: Shows all-plus amplitude vanishes; derives u-channel factorization for two-minus amplitude.

title: Non-Relativistic QFT and Leading Order Effects
desc: Analyzing NR limit of QFT with massless exchange, leading to Schrödinger equation.

title: Massless Amplitudes & Spinor Helicity
desc: Spinor helicity formalism for massless amplitudes using Lorentz group decomposition.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensation in 2D and 3D Trapped Gases
desc: Proofs of no BEC in 2D ideal Bose gas and BEC in 3D harmonic trap.

title: QFT: Renormalization and Photon Field
desc: Covers QFT basics, renormalization, perturbation theory, and photon field quantization.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 6: Central Force Field
desc: Derivation of kinetic operator and bound state condition in spherical well.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7
desc: Seventh assignment covering key quantum mechanics concepts.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: Introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering QED scattering calculation.
link: /physics/Quantum Physics/Quantum Field Theory/Feynman Diagrams for Beginners

title: 统计力学第3次作业：相变热力学推导
desc: 证明相变中摩尔内能变化及潜热随温度变化率公式，并简化气相-凝聚相情况。

title: 统计力学第6次作业：二维气体与相对速度分布
desc: 推导二维理想气体速度分布，计算平均、最概然和方均根速率，并求相对速度分布。

title: 4-Point Amplitudes and Yang-Mills
desc: Analyzing 4-point amplitudes using on-shell factorization and consistency, leading to Yang-Mills theory.

title: 引力波的产生、传播与探测
desc: 线性引力近似下引力波的产生、传播与探测原理。
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: 统计力学第7次作业：熵与磁化
desc: 求解爱因斯坦固体熵及顺磁体磁化强度与磁化率。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 3: Step Potential
desc: Reflection and transmission coefficients for a step potential, verifying probability conservation.

title: 量子力学中的对称性与守恒量
desc: 分析自由粒子角动量守恒性并证明Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in QFT
desc: Exploring Green functions and poles in momentum space for scalar particles.

title: General Relativity Homework 4: Killing Vectors
desc: Proving δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors of Schwarzschild metric.

title: General Relativity Homework 5 Analysis
desc: Calculates Christoffel symbols and Ricci tensor for a time-relevant metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 4: Operator Identities
desc: Proofs of inverse Hermitian conjugate and generalized uncertainty relation.

title: 统计力学作业：混合粒子系统分布
desc: 分析经典、玻色、费米粒子最概然分布，β对应温度。
